===Pokémon Horizon===
[[File:Kukui Horizon.png|thumb|170px|Professor Kukui in Pokémon Horizon]]
Professor Kukui first appeared in ''[[HOR01|Journey to a New Horizon]]'', where he introduced the [[Alola]] region to {{hor|Akira}}. Later, he taught him the concept of a {{pkmn|Trainer}} and helped him and [[Mana]] to defeat a {{pkmn2|wild}} {{p|Drampa}}.
{{-}}
